title: USGS Streamflow and the Water Cycle
description: A USGS source card about streamflow, rivers, measurement, flooding, drought, and water systems.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS streamflow resources connect river flow, precipitation, groundwater, flooding, drought, and measurement networks.
Use this source for data reading, local watershed investigations, and explanations of how water moves through connected systems.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked media may have separate credit or rights requirements. Check item-level rights.
